name: Crispy Oatmeal Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and brown sugar together thoroughly.
2. Beat in warm water. Set aside 1/4 cup flour for rolling.
3. Mix together the remaining dry ingredients (flour and baking soda).
4. Stir the dry mixture into the creamed butter mixture.
5. Gradually add the remaining flour until the dough is stiff enough to roll.
6. Divide the dough into three equal lumps.
7. Roll each lump of dough out about 1/8 inch thick and cut into pieces.
8. Place the cookies on a lightly greased cookie sheet.
9. Bake at 350°F for about 10 minutes or until golden brown around the edges.
10. Remove from the pan and cool completely.
11. Store in a covered container.
Makes about 36 cookies, with 3 cookies per serving:
126 calories, 1 starch choice, 1 fats choice
16 grams carbohydrate, 2 grams protein, 6 grams fat.
